headline: Enphase Energy Stock Sees RS Rating Climb To 83
summary: The Relative Strength (RS) Rating for Enphase Energy stock entered a new percentile Tuesday, with an increase from 80 to 83.    Looking For The Best Stocks To Buy And Watch? Start Here  This unique rating measures market leadership by showing how a stock's price movement over the last 52 weeks measures up against that of other stocks on the major indexes.

headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on First Solar, Lowers Price Target to $269
summary: Guggenheim  analyst Joseph Osha   maintains First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $312 to $269.
